title: paepalanthus complanatus
intro: Paepalanthus complanatus, also known as the flat-leaved Paepalanthus, is a species of plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Brazil, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paepalanthus complanatus are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Paepalanthus complanatus are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in teas and tinctures.
